steps: Log in to your Resend account or sign up at https://resend.com/signup
Click 'Add API Key' in the top-right corner
Enter a name for the key and select the permission level (Full access or Sending access)
Optionally restrict the key to a specific verified domain
Copy the generated API key immediately — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Resend API key. Sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Free tier includes 3,000 emails/month and 1 custom domain
API key is shown only once at creation time
You must verify at least one sending domain before sending to external addresses
The 'onboarding@resend.dev' address can be used for testing without domain verification
Keys can be scoped to a specific domain for additional security

test_endpoint.description: List verified sending domains to confirm the API key is working
